prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic wide-angle shot from inside a spacecraft looking out a circular window into the deep blackness of space. On the left side of the frame, a massive, highly detailed crescent Moon dominates the view, showcasing intricate craters and rugged terrain illuminated by harsh sunlight. On the right side, a smaller crescent Earth glows with blue oceans and white atmospheric clouds. In the immediate foreground on the far left, an astronaut's arm wearing a dark blue spacesuit is visible, featuring a prominent NASA patch on the shoulder. The astronaut is holding a digital tablet with a glowing blue, complex user interface. The edge of the spacecraft window frames the scene, with subtle lens flares and reflections on the glass adding to the immersive, sci-fi documentary aesthetic. High contrast, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution.
